channel.title: Metrics on Exoscale Academy
channel.description: Recent content in Metrics on Exoscale Academy

item.title: Solution - Metrics
item.description:
1. Install the metrics server (https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/metrics-server)
k apply -f https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/metrics-server/releases/latest/download/components.yaml
  1. Verify it’s not running correctly

Trying to get the Nodes or Pods metrics should return an error

k top node
Error from server (ServiceUnavailable): the server is currently unable to handle the request (get nodes.metrics.k8s.io)

k top pod
Error from server (ServiceUnavailable): the server is currently unable to handle the request (get pods.metrics.k8s.io)

Checking the logs of the metrics-server pod will provide additional details
